mathematical_construction.description: RFT operator is explicitly constructed via QR decomposition of LDS-phased Gaussian-convolution dictionary

findings.small_sizes: High correlation with existing transforms (DFT, Walsh)

uniqueness_assessment.issue: For small N (8-16), RFT approximates existing transforms due to limited degrees of freedom

transform_family_status.classification: Ψ is a new, explicitly defined unitary operator with golden ratio structure
limitations: Not yet proven as new transform family (requires larger N for distinctness)
High correlation with existing transforms for small dimensions
Golden ratio structure needs refinement for true uniqueness

practical_implications.signal_processing: LIMITED (due to similarity to existing transforms)

immediate: Revise claims to reflect "new unitary operator" rather than "new transform family"
Focus on golden ratio structure as primary novelty
Highlight cryptographic applications where uniqueness matters less
future_research: Develop fast algorithms for practical utility
Explore parameter variations beyond basic golden ratio
Study asymptotic properties for true transform family status
